summary: Full-stack testing for Booking-style hotel app. Backend (FastAPI + MongoDB) and frontend (Expo Router) both fully functional. 5/5 backend pytest passed and all critical frontend flows (list, card-tap navigation, detail page with 3 action buttons, back navigation, 404 handling) verified via Playwright on mobile viewport (390x844). The image-to-textbox is flush (gap=0px) as required.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for create operation (REST convention). Not blocking.
Uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') instead of lifespan handler (FastAPI deprecation warning). Not blocking.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated on web; consider replacing card shadow with boxShadow for RN Web compatibility. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate startup/shutdown handlers to FastAPI lifespan.
(Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow for web.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (correct for Expo public env) – aligned with frontend/.env. Backend env keys MONGO_URL/DB_NAME used as required.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} – verified no _id leak in API responses.
All interactive elements have testID (hotel-card-*, action-*-button, back-button, home-retry-button).
Linking used for tel:/mailto:/Google Maps – cannot be functionally tested in browser preview but URLs are correctly constructed.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 8 Turkish hotels on startup when collection is empty. One TEST_ hotel was created and deleted during cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_hotels.py. Frontend mobile viewport 390x844. Home shows FlatList of hotel cards (testID=hotel-card-{id}), tap navigates to /hotel/[id] (testID=hotel-detail-name, action-location/phone/email-button, back-button).
